title: The Chaos SMP Modpack
description: This is the official modpack for Chaos SMP
body:
This is the official modpack for Chaos SMP.

The use of the modpack is intended for the Chaos SMP server.


Includes the Chaos SMP resource pack inside, as well as 2 cannonical shaderpacks!
Complementary Shaders used.

DOES NOT COME WITH THE CHAOS SMP WORLD
ALL IMAGES IN GALLARY ARE FROM THE CHAOS SMP WORLD
